content: Room admins can create and manage rooms, invite new users and assign roles of room admin or lower. Room admins can upload forms to the room and have full access to the Complete and In Process folders.

comment.text: Room admins can create and manage rooms, including uploading forms to the room and accessing certain folders. This description is used in the access options for a "Form Room" type of room, likely displayed in a UI element such as a button or dialog related to room management.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation of 'In Process' as 'Im Nicht ausgefüllt' (In Not filled) is incorrect and conveys the opposite meaning of a folder containing items currently being processed.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Raumadministratoren können Räume erstellen und verwalten, neue Benutzer einladen und die Rolle eines Raumadministrators oder niedriger zuweisen. Raumadministratoren können Formulare in den Raum hochladen und haben vollen Zugriff auf die Ordner "Ausgefüllt" und "In Bearbeitung".

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'upload forms to the room' is translated as 'ձևաթղթեր վերբեռնել սենյակ', which is grammatically incorrect and missing the preposition 'to/in' (into the room), making it sound like 'upload forms room'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Սենյակի ադմինիստրատորները կարող են ստեղծել և կառավարել սենյակներ, հրավիրել նոր օգտատերեր և նշանակել սենյակի ադմինիստրատորի կամ ավելի ցածր դերեր: Սենյակի ադմինիստրատորները կարող են ձևաթղթեր վերբեռնել սենյակում և ունենալ ամբողջական մուտք դեպի «Ավարտված» և «Ընթացքի մեջ» թղթապանակները:

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation of 'In Process' folder as 'Nepabeigts' (Unfinished) is semantically different from 'In Process' (In progress/Ongoing). In a UI context, 'In Process' usually refers to a status of work being currently handled, whereas 'Nepabeigts' implies something that was left incomplete.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Telpu administratori var izveidot un pārvaldīt telpas, uzaicināt jaunus lietotājus un piešķirt telpas administratora vai zemāka līmeņa lomas. Telpu administratori var augšupielādēt veidlapas telpā, un viņiem ir pilnīga piekļuve mapēm Pabeigts un Procesā.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'sunt oferite acces complet' is grammatically incorrect and changes the meaning from 'have full access' (active) to 'full access is offered' (passive/impersonal), which sounds unnatural in a UI context. More importantly, 'administrator sală' lacks the necessary article/preposition to match 'room admin'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Administratorii sălilor pot crea şi gestiona sălile, pot invita noi utilizatori şi pot atribui roluri de administrator de sală sau de nivel inferior. Administratorii sălilor pot încărca formulare în sală şi au acces complet la folderele Formulare completate şi În curs de completare.
